# Sniper — Design System (v2)

**Generated by UI/UX Pro Max** (`design-system/sniper/MASTER.md`) and adapted to our Tailwind v4 + shadcn tokens.

**Aesthetic:** Flat Design · B2B SaaS · Professional · Light-default · Purposeful motion
**Anti-vibe:** No glassy gradients on every surface. No violet glow. No dark-by-default. No decorative animation that doesn't communicate state.

---

## 1. Color tokens (oklch, mapped to Tailwind/shadcn)

| Role               | Light                          | Dark                          | Hex anchor |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------ | ----------------------------- | ---------- |
| `background`       | near-white slate (`0.985 …`)   | navy `0.16 0.03 250`          | `#F8FAFC`  |
| `foreground`       | near-black `0.18 0.04 250`     | near-white                    | `#020617`  |
| `primary`          | navy `0.21 0.05 250`           | white                         | `#0F172A`  |
| `accent` (CTA)     | electric blue `0.55 0.16 240`  | electric blue `0.62 0.16 240` | `#0369A1`  |
| `success` / `gem`  | green `0.62 0.16 150`          | green `0.7 0.16 150`          | `#10B981`  |
| `warning`          | amber `0.75 0.15 75`           | amber `0.78 0.15 75`          | `#F59E0B`  |
| `destructive`      | red `0.6 0.22 25`              | red `0.7 0.22 25`             | `#DC2626`  |
| `border`           | slate-200 `0.92 0.005 240`     | white/10                      | `#E2E8F0`  |
| `muted`            | slate-50 `0.97 0.005 240`      | navy-2 `0.22 0.025 250`       | `#F1F5F9`  |

**Hard rules**
- One CTA color (electric blue). Use everywhere primary action lives.
- One signal color per state: green = success/gem, amber = in-progress, red = error. Never repurpose.
- Never use color alone to encode state — pair with icon and label.

---

## 2. Typography

| Family             | Variable                  | Use                                        |
| ------------------ | ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| Plus Jakarta Sans  | `--font-jakarta`          | All UI: headings, body, controls           |
| JetBrains Mono     | `--font-jetbrains-mono`   | Numbers, IDs, code, timers, tabular data   |

**Scale**

- Hero display: `text-5xl`/`text-6xl`, `tracking-tight`, `font-semibold` (600), `leading-[1.05]`
- Page title: `text-2xl` semibold
- Section eyebrow: `text-xs` uppercase tracking-wider in `text-accent`
- Body: `text-sm` `leading-relaxed`
- Meta / table cells: `text-xs`
- Numerals always `tabular-nums` and (for dashboards) `font-mono`

---

## 3. Spacing & layout (data-dense)

Per the skill's **Data-Dense Dashboard** style: 12-col grid, 8–12px gap, 12–14px font, sticky headers, compact cards.

- Card padding: `p-4` standard, `p-5` only for hero/landing
- Row height: 36–44px for tables and pipeline cards
- Container max-widths: `max-w-7xl` for landing, `max-w-screen-2xl` for dashboard
- Sidebar: 224px expanded / 56px collapsed
- Topbar: 56px tall, sticky, no shadow — bottom border only

---

## 4. Radius & elevation

- Radius: `0.5rem` everywhere except buttons (`0.5rem`), avatars/dots (full)
- Elevation: only `shadow-sm` for resting cards, `shadow-md` on hover. **No drop shadow on the page background.** The structure is communicated by 1px borders, not shadows.

---

## 5. Motion (purposeful, not decorative)

The user wants animation — but it must communicate state. Every motion answers "what changed?"

| Pattern                | Implementation                                     | When                                          |
| ---------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| Scroll reveal          | IntersectionObserver + `y: 16 → 0`, `opacity 0→1`  | Section enters viewport (once)                |
| KPI count-up           | `NumberTicker` on mount + on value-change          | Stats, scores                                 |
| Layout reorder         | framer-motion `layout` + spring (s:280, d:28)      | Pipeline reshuffles when weights change       |
| Live pulse             | `animate-pulse` ring around dot                    | Live status, "watching" indicator             |
| Page transition        | `motion.div` initial/animate per route             | Welcome → questions → submitted (OA)          |
| Bar/line draw-in       | SVG `pathLength: 0 → 1`                            | Score distribution, sparkline mounts          |
| Hover                  | 150ms color/border transition only                 | Buttons, cards, list rows                     |
| Reduced-motion         | All durations clamped, layout transitions disabled | Always honor `prefers-reduced-motion`         |

**Forbidden:** decorative scale transforms on hover, infinite shimmer borders on neutral surfaces, gradient page backgrounds that move, parallax on text.

---

## 6. User-journey rules

The user explicitly asked for a **more obvious user journey**. Treat these as load-bearing:

1. **Always show "where you are."** Top of every dashboard view: breadcrumbs (`Workspace › Frontend Engineer › Sarah Khan`).
2. **Always show "what's next."** Empty/first-run states ship with a 3-step journey card: Define role → Watch matches → Send OAs. Steps complete visually as state changes.
3. **CTAs are unambiguous.** Primary CTA is `bg-primary text-white`, secondary is `border` only. Never two equally-styled CTAs side-by-side.
4. **Live state is visible.** Top-right status pill: "Watching 47 hackathons · live" with green pulsing dot. Confirms the product is doing its job.
5. **Numbers earn their place.** No fake "metric" cards without a unit and short delta (`+3 this week`).

---

## 7. Anti-patterns (from the skill, plus our own)

- ❌ Dark mode by default (light first, dark via toggle)
- ❌ Glassmorphism on dashboard surfaces
- ❌ Violet glow / single accent saturated for everything
- ❌ Marketing copy with em-dashes used as filler
- ❌ Ambient "live" feeds that don't reference real state
- ❌ Cards whose only difference from a div is `rounded-lg`
- ❌ Hover states that shift layout

---

## 8. Stack reference

- React/Next.js 16 App Router · Tailwind v4 · shadcn/ui (base-nova preset)
- framer-motion `layout` + `LayoutGroup` for the weight-slider reshuffle
- Magic UI used sparingly: `BlurFade` (page transitions), `NumberTicker` (KPIs), `Marquee` (logo strip). Magic UI's flashier components (`MagicCard`, `ShimmerButton`) are **not used** in v2 — they read as vibe-coded.
